Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the capture executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: threadSelectorPatterns
Argument.Description: Regular expression to select threads to be watched by name, optionally followed (separated by space) by regular expression to select by stack frame label. Default: all threads. Example: . ^six

Argument.name: sampleCount
Argument.Description: Number of samples to take. Default: 100

Argument.name: aggregationPattern
Argument.Description: Regular expression to select stack frames to compute aggregated results for. Example: XMLObjectFactory:toXml

Argument.name: suspendPattern
Argument.Description: Regular expression to suppress details below stack frame. Example: ^java

Argument.name: resumePattern
Argument.Description: Regular expression to re-enable details at stack frame. Example: ^six|^sailpoint

Argument.name: runTop
Argument.Description: Include the output of top -H into the report

Argument.name: runJmap
Argument.Description: Include the output of jmap -histo:live into the report
